message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: My feature: add error_threshold param to Image.quantize(). Touches quantize() method in src/PIL/Image.py and its tests. What files does your feature touch? If we both need Image.py, let's coordinate on non-overlapping regions/functions within it (e.g. I'll only touch the quantize() method) rather than splitting files.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: My feature: add sort_palette param to Image.quantize() for post-quantization palette sorting. Only need to touch quantize() method in Image.py and its tests. Please tell me which files/functions you need so we can avoid overlap in Image.py if your feature also touches it.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: We both need to add an independent kwarg to quantize() in the same file/tests, so file-level disjointness isn't possible. Proposal: take turns editing to avoid clobbering on the shared filesystem. You go first since you proposed first - please add your sort_palette param + tests, then send DONE. I'll wait (coop-await), then pull your changes into my working copy before adding my error_threshold param additively (new kwarg, won't touch your code paths). I'll send DONE when finished. Sound good?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: We both need quantize() in Image.py - can't split by file. Let's split by region instead: (1) signature - I'll append my new kwarg 'sort_palette=None' as the LAST parameter, after wherever you add yours, i.e. signature order: (self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=None, sort_palette=None). (2) docstring - you add your :param error_threshold: line first, I add my :param sort_palette: line immediately after, right before the closing of the docstring. (3) body - your error_threshold logic likely applies during/before quantization; place it before the 'im = im.im.quantize(...)' call region. My sort_palette logic applies AFTER the palette is built, so I'll add it as a new block right before the final 'return self._new(im)' statement, touching no lines you touch. Reply ACCEPT if this works, then I'll wait for your DONE (or proceed in parallel) before touching the signature/docstring lines myself so we don't clobber the same line.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Agreed - I'll go first. I'll add sort_palette=None as the new last kwarg, add a :param sort_palette: line at the end of the docstring, and add my sorting logic as a new block right before 'return self._new(im)' so it doesn't touch your quantization logic. I'll send DONE when finished; you can then add error_threshold additively without touching my new lines.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Accepted. Plan: signature order (self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=None, sort_palette=None); my :param error_threshold: docstring line first, your :param sort_palette: line right after; my error_threshold body logic goes before the im.im.quantize(...) call, your sort_palette logic goes right before 'return self._new(im)'. I'll go first now and send DONE when finished editing Image.py/tests so you can safely add your lines without us clobbering each other on the same lines.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Finished my error_threshold changes. Signature is now: (self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=None). Docstring param added right after 'dither'. Body: new if/else block replacing the old 'im = self._new(self.im.quantize(colors, method, kmeans))' line, right before 'from . import ImagePalette' - if error_threshold branch, else branch has the original line unchanged. You're clear to add sort_palette=None after error_threshold in the signature, your docstring line after mine, and your body block right before 'return self._new(im)' at the end of quantize(). Go ahead.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Finished. In Image.py's quantize(): added 'sort_palette=None' as the new LAST kwarg in the signature (after dither), added a :param sort_palette: docstring line at the end of the docstring, and added a self-contained block right before the final 'return im' (only reached on the non-reference-palette path) that validates sort_palette in ('brightness','rgb'), computes a sort key, and calls im.remap_palette(order). No other lines in quantize() touched. Added 3 new tests at the end of Tests/test_image_quantize.py (test_sort_palette_brightness, test_sort_palette_rgb, test_sort_palette_invalid) - no existing test lines modified. You're clear to add error_threshold now; the signature line and docstring block are the only spots where you'll need to interleave with my additions.
